200.description: Get all the available subscription periods in the user segment

SizePage.description: Maximum number of items to return.

Count.description: Number of items returned in this page.

TotalItems.description: Total number of items matching the request (across all pages).

items.description: A representation of a subscription period.

IdUserCreation.description: Id of the user who created the ressource.

DateCreation.description: Date on which the ressource was created.

IdUserUpdate.description: Id of the user who last updated the ressource.

DateUpdate.description: Date on which the ressource was updated.

IdSegment.description: Id of the segment related to the ressource.

IdSubscription.description: Id of the Subscription related to this Subscription Period.

DateStart.description: Start Date of the Subscription Period.

DateEnd.description: End Date of the Subscription Period.

IsTrial.description: If false, the Subscription Period is not a Trial Period.

items.title: SubscriptionPeriod

204.description: No results. Response body is Empty

401.description: Invalid or no credentials passed in the request

Message.description: A message localized in your language.

403.description: The operation cannot be processed. The response contains a JSON error object with more information

Message.description: A message localized in your language.
